'''Ashkas-kov''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in [[Shelsha sector/Legends|Shelsha sector]]. It was situated along a minor trade [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperroute]].

==History==
At one time, Ashkas-kov was the setting of a raid staged by the [[BloodScar]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]]. In this episode, the BloodScars attacked an entire convoy with ten of their own ships, even blowing up the four ships they were primarily targeting after stripping them of goods. [[Casement]], an undercover [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] agent, was a survivor of the raid.

{{Planet-stub}}
